hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.go$'; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .)" && go vet ./... 2>&1 | head -20; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'DROP\s+(SCHEMA|TABLE|DATABASE).*CASCADE|rm\s+-rf\s+/|TRUNCATE.*sage\.' ; then echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive command detected. Use specific, non-cascading operations.' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'migrations/.*\.sql$'; then echo 'WARNING: Modifying migration file. Never edit existing migrations — append a new numbered migration instead.' ; fi

cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .)" && if git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q '\.go$'; then echo 'Go files changed. Run before committing:\n  go test ./... -v -short -race\n  golangci-lint run ./...'; fi
